title: More Structures | Overworld
description: This mod adds several Vanilla like Structures to the Overworld
body:
# More Structures
## Overworld
### 📜Description:
_This mod adds **Vanilla** like Structures to the Overworld.
In general it aims to add those Structures to more uncommon or empty Biomes._

### 🏰Structures
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![The Bee Keeping with no Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa9ac2a1b4510bf9895aa8dd9411ff3ce9b99883_0.webp)
![The Bee Keeping with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c827c6f89fcc97738b2faeb7af483a35e59c82bf_0.webp)

### 🧩Loot Tables (Compatibility):
For chests I sticked to 100% Vanilla Loot Tables.
That means this mod is mostly compatiblie with mods that add items to Vanilla Loot Tables, e.g. Farmers Delight, Quark, Supplementaries and many more.
But i also used some more uncommon Loot Tables like the Piglin Bartering or Fishing Treasure Loot Table.
Like that i tried to make the chest loot as most fitting as possible.

### ℹ️More Information:
This is the first mod of a series i started working on. If you have any questions about this mod or the next ones, feel free to write a comment on the Curse Forge page of this mod.\
Have a great day :D\
r_y_o_t_o
